/*
CHORDS

*/ 

// 1  Om Mitraaya Namaha        dm1  DFA
// 2  Om Ravaye Namaha          F3   CFA
// 3  Om Suryaaya Namaha        C1   CEG
// 4  Om Bhanave Namaha
// 5  Om Kagaaya Namaha         dm1  DFA
// 6  Om Pushne Namaha          F3   CFA
// 7  Om Hiranyagarbhaya Namah  C1   CEG
// 8  Om Marichaye Namaha       am2  CEA
// 9  Om Aadityaaya Namaha      dm1  DFA
// 10 Om Savitre Namaha         F3   CFA
// 11 Om Arkaaya Namaha         C1   CEG 
// 12 Om Bhaskaraaya Namaha     am2  CEA

$: note(`< 
  [- - - ]
  [d4,f4,a4] 
  [c4,f4,a4]
  [c4,e4,g4]
  [c4,e4,a4]
  [d4,f4,a4]
  [c4,f4,a4]
  [c4,e4,g4]
  [c4,e4,a4]
  [d4,f4,a4]
  [c4,f4,a4]
  [c4,e4,g4]
  [c4,e4,a4]
>`)  
  //.sound("gm_drawbar_organ:3")
  //.sound("gm_rock_organ:1")
  .s("gm_pad_poly")
  .lpf(sine.range(500, 1200).slow(8))
  .lpq(3)
  .attack(.3)
  .release(2)
  .room(.8)
  .transpose(-12)
  .postgain(1) 
  .slow(2)
  ._pianoroll()
/*
DRUMS
*/

$: sound("dhum ~ na ki dhum ~ thom ki")
  .bank("mridangam")
  .slow(2)
  .gain(sine.range(.35, .6).slow(16))
  .color("red")
  ._punchcard()


/*

DRONE

*/

$: note("d2,a2,d3")
  .s("gm_pad_warm")
  .lpf(sine.range(250, 600).slow(16))
  .attack(1)
  .release(5)
  .room(.9)
  .postgain(slider(0.214,0,2))
  .slow(8)
  .color("yellow")
  ._pianoroll()
